_comment: Benchmark regression thresholds. Populate from a known-good nightly run. Each key is a scenario name from @@BENCH_JSON@@ output. Values are the baseline metrics to compare against (20% tolerance by default).
_usage: Extract from nightly artifacts: grep '@@BENCH_JSON@@' artifacts/nightly/*.txt | sed 's/@@BENCH_JSON@@//' | jq -s 'map({(.scenario): {handler_per_s: .metrics.throughput.handler_per_s, enqueue_per_s: .metrics.enqueue_per_s, p99_ms: .metrics.latency_ms.p99}}) | add'
